items.title: Karnataka delegation invites Naidu for inauguration of Tungabhadra crest gates
items.summary: Andhra Pradesh and Karnataka jointly replaced all 33 crest gates within six months after Gate No. 19 was washed away in last year’s floods; inauguration scheduled on June 25
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Cuba’s Fuel Crisis Brings Schools to a Standstill
items.summary: The country’s already-struggling schools are ending the academic year early because of a crippling fuel shortage caused by the U.S. oil blockade.

items.title: Why has Keir Starmer resigned as UK prime minister, and who will take over?
items.summary: The United Kingdom will have its seventh prime minister in a decade.
